cover: System architecture diagram: 'Agentforce DX Metadata Lifecycle 2026'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Agentforce DX: .agent to AiAuthoringBundle to Production'. Subtitle 'Source-controlled agents, CI gates, preview sessions, v64.0 deployments'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Authoring' (pastel blue): modules '.agent file', 'Agent Script linter', 'prompt + topic specs'. LAYER 2 'Metadata Build' (pastel purple): modules 'sf agent generate agent-spec', 'AiAuthoringBundle metadata', 'Salesforce API v64.0 deploy'. LAYER 3 'Runtime Validation' (pastel green): modules 'sf agent preview', 'Agentforce sessions', 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2'. Central node 'CI/CD Pipeline' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): '@salesforce/mcp tools' and 'Data 360 grounding'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Promotion Controls': sub-modules 'static checks', 'eval tests', 'rollback tag' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Agentforce DX Metadata Lifecycle'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Agentforce DX Metadata Lifecycle'. Subtitle '.agent source → agent spec → AiAuthoringBundle → preview sessions'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Source Control with Git branch icon', 'Salesforce API v64.0 Deploy with cloud upload icon', 'Atlas Reasoning Engine v2 Preview with neural node icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD LIFECYCLE' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD LIFECYCLE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'agent.instructions = \"updated in browser\";\\n// no git diff\\n// no preview session\\n// no rollback tag', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'sf agent generate agent-spec --agent-file force-app/main/default/agents/support_triage.agent\\nsf project deploy validate --source-dir force-app/main/default/aiAuthoringBundles\\nsf agent preview --agent-spec agent-specs/support_triage.agent-spec.json'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'version .agent files', 'deploy inactive bundles', 'validate with preview sessions'. Footer bar: 'If it cannot be rebuilt from Git, it is not production-ready.' Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Agentforce Preview Evals as CI Gates'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Agentforce Preview Evals as CI Gates'. Subtitle 'Behavioral tests for Agentforce 2.0 before production activation'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Regression Prompts with clipboard icon', 'Tool Call Assertions with wrench icon', 'Confirmation Checks with shield icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD TEST' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD TEST' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: 'input: \"Route this refund case\"\\nassert: response.length > 0\\n// tool calls ignored\\n// confirmation ignored', right column green border '// GOOD' code: 'mustMention: [\"billing\", \"human\", \"escalate\"]\\nmustNotCallTools: [\"Route_Case_To_Queue\"]\\nrequiredConfirmation: true'. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'assert final answer', 'assert blocked tools', 'assert confirmation'. Footer bar: 'Deploy validation is structural. Preview evals are behavioral.' Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
